panels.description: Actual bare-metal CPU usage. Requires Node Exporter.
panels.title: Physical Host CPU Saturation

panels.description: Actual used memory (Total - Available). Requires Node Exporter.
panels.title: Physical Host RAM Usage

panels.description: System load average. High load with low CPU usage suggests I/O wait. Requires Node Exporter.
panels.title: Physical Host Load Average (15m)

panels.description: Used space on the root mount. If this fills up, the hypervisor may crash. Requires Node Exporter.
panels.title: Physical Host Root FileSystem Usage

panels.description: Dropped packets or hardware errors on physical interfaces. If this line moves, checking cabling, switch ports, or MTU.
panels.title: Physical Host Interface Drops & Errors

panels.description: Number of times the Linux Kernel killed a process due to Out Of Memory. Should be ZERO.
panels.title: Physical Host OOM Kills (Last 1h)

panels.description: Hypervisor CPU Commit: active Nova vCPUs divided by host CPU threads. 100% = 1:1 commit; values >100% indicate overcommit.
panels.title: Hypervisor CPU Commit

panels.description: Total active Nova vCPUs scheduled on each hypervisor.
panels.title: Hypervisor vCPU Allocation

panels.description: VM CPU usage per hypervisor: sum of instance vCPU usage divided by host CPU threads.
panels.title: Hypervisor Live VM CPU Usage

panels.description: Percentage of each hypervisor’s total host RAM currently used by its instances (guest memory used vs host capacity).
panels.title: Hypervisor Live Instance Memory vs Host Capacity

panels.description: RAM commit per hypervisor: total instance-allocated RAM divided by host RAM capacity. >100% indicates overcommit.
panels.title: Hypervisor Ram Commit

panels.description: Total instance-allocated guest RAM (MB) per hypervisor.
panels.title: Hypervisor Allocated Instance Memory (MB)

panels.description: For each hypervisor, percentage of instance memory actually used versus memory allocated to those instances (guest view).
panels.title: Hypervisor Live Instance Ram Use vs Instance Allocation

panels.description: Total guest-view RAM in use (MB) by all instances on each hypervisor.
panels.title: Hypervisor Live Instance Memory (MB)

panels.description: Per-hypervisor disk read throughput sourced from instances (guest reads summed at the hypervisor).
panels.title: Hypervisor Disk Read Throughput

panels.description: Per-hypervisor disk write throughput sourced from instances (guest writes summed at the hypervisor).
panels.title: Hypervisor Disk Write Throughput

panels.description: Per-hypervisor cumulative disk reads over the time window (guest reads summed at the hypervisor).
panels.title: Hypervisor Disk Read Total

panels.description: Per-hypervisor cumulative disk writes over the time window (guest writes summed at the hypervisor).
panels.title: Hypervisor Disk Write Total

panels.description: Per-hypervisor disk read IOPS (guest read operations summed at the hypervisor).
panels.title: Hypervisor Disk Read IOPS

panels.description: Per-hypervisor disk write IOPS (guest write operations summed at the hypervisor).
panels.title: Hypervisor Disk Write IOPS

panels.description: Per-hypervisor aggregate RX packet rate sourced from instances.
panels.title: Hypervisor Network RX Packets per Second

panels.description: Per-hypervisor aggregate TX packet rate sourced from instances.
panels.title: Hypervisor Network TX Packets per Second

panels.description: Per-hypervisor aggregate RX bandwidth (Gbit/s) sourced from instances.
panels.title: Hypervisor Network RX Transmit Gbit/s

panels.description: Per-hypervisor aggregate TX bandwidth (Gbit/s) sourced from instances.
panels.title: Hypervisor Network TX Transmit Gbit/s

panels.description: Total conntrack entries per hypervisor (all flows tracked in the conntrack table).
panels.title: Conntrack Flows per Hypervisor

panels.description: Conntrack table utilization per hypervisor: percentage of the conntrack capacity currently in use.
panels.title: Conntrack Utilization by Hypervisor
